place: Layan, Tambon Choeng Thale, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Hillside Wellness Villa in Layan
blurb: Set high on the Layan hillside, an expansive contemporary villa conceived as a self-contained wellness retreat — minimalist architecture, a long lap pool, and resort-level spa, sauna and cinema spaces wrapped in landscaped valley views.
detail:
Set on an expansive hillside plot in the Layan area, this private luxury villa offers a rare combination of scale, architectural clarity and resort-level wellness amenities. Conceived as a self-contained retreat, the residence blends minimalist contemporary lines with warm natural textures, creating a calm, elevated atmosphere throughout. Arranged across several interconnected volumes on roughly 1,700 m² of land — with a built-up area approaching 1,700 m² — high ceilings, wide glazed façades and soft natural light let the indoor and outdoor zones merge into one continuous environment.

The primary living pavilion centres on a large open-plan lounge and dining area with an effortless connection to the pool terrace, supported by two kitchens: a beautifully appointed show kitchen for daily use and social gatherings, and a fully equipped back kitchen positioned discreetly for service. Five ensuite bedrooms are positioned across the villa for privacy and refined proportion; the master suite occupies its own wing with direct pool access, a spacious bathroom and ample wardrobe space, while a dedicated maid's room with separate circulation maintains the home's sense of order.

Lifestyle and wellness spaces define the villa's character — a dedicated spa room and sauna, a fitness room, a home theatre and a quiet study extend it far beyond a standard residence. Outdoors, a long swimming pool follows the line of the main pavilion alongside shaded seating and wide terraces, with mature planting and architectural screens keeping the home secluded. Tucked into a low-density stretch of the Layan hillside, it remains a short drive from Layan Beach, Banana Beach, Laguna Phuket and Bang Tao's dining and lifestyle destinations.
